There are no embedded malicious behaviors, network calls, or data exfiltration mechanisms.\n- **Obfuscated score:** All are zero, which is correct; the code is clear, straightforward, and not obfuscated.\n- **Security risk:** Slightly above zero (0.1) in some reports, justified by the fact that this code enables interaction with potentially sensitive smart contracts.
